input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.10.1.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.10.1.2
            TITLE: teams who register without the accumulator:

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.10.1.2: Teams who register without the Accumulator:
EV.10.1.2 Teams who register without the Accumulator: 
a. Must not bring their Accumulator onsite for the duration of the competition 
b. May participate in Technical Inspection and Static Events

final_answer: rule EV.10.1.2: Teams who register without the Accumulator: EV.10.1.2 Teams who register without the Accumulator: a. Must not bring their Accumulator onsite for the duration of the competition b. May participate in Technical Inspection and Static Events
